title: Is there a way to make conditional automations?
excerpt:
Is there a way to do a conditional automation? 
I need something like: 
If due date is today and status is Complete then do x, y and z

posts.author: ChrisFNaples (Chris Farrugia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to do a conditional automation?

I need something like:

If due date is today and status is Complete then do x, y and z

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes, we have them.

Its going to be like this… When date arrives and status is something…

Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml: This shouldn’t be limited to dates and status fields. I may also want to test many other conditions like if two fields are equal, or a calculated column (I know we can’t use formula columns in automations yet) is equal to another column, etc. etc.
